자바 1104 실습
package sec04;
import java.awt.*;
import java.awt.event.*;
import javax.swing.*;

//1. 독립된 클래스 정의
//코드 작성
class MyGUI1 implements ActionListener{

	@Override
	public void actionPerformed(ActionEvent e) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		//실행할 코드
		//System.out.println(e);
		System.out.println("확인버튼을 눌렀습니다");
		//setTitle("확인 버튼을 눌렀습니다");
		JButton btn=(JButton) e.getSource();
		//btn.setText("OK");
		if(btn.getText().equals("확인"))
			btn.setText("OK");
		else
			btn.setText("확인");
	}
}

class MyGUI2 implements ActionListener{

	@Override
	public void actionPerformed(ActionEvent e) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		//실행할 코드
		//System.out.println(e);
		System.out.println("취소버튼을 눌렀습니다");
		//setTitle(" 버튼을 눌렀습니다");	
		JButton btn=(JButton) e.getSource();
		//btn.setText("");
		if(btn.getText().equals("취소"))
			btn.setText("Cancle");
		else
			btn.setText("취소");
		
	}
}
public class EventTest1 extends JFrame{
	
	EventTest1() {
		setTitle("액션 이벤트 리스너 예제");
		setLayout(new FlowLayout());
		JButton btn1 = new JButton("확인");
		JButton btn2 = new JButton("취소");


		add(btn1);
		add(btn2);
		// 2. 리스너 등록
		btn1.addActionListener(new MyGUI1());
		btn2.addActionListener(new MyGUI2());

		setSize(300, 150);
		setVisible(true);
	}

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		new EventTest1 ();
	}

}

package sec04;
import java.awt.*;
import java.awt.event.*;
import javax.swing.*;
//내부 클래스로 Action 이벤트 리스너 만들기


public class EventTest2 extends JFrame{
	
	//멤버 변수 선언
	JButton btn1,btn2,btn3;
	EventTest2() {
		setTitle("액션 이벤트 리스너 예제");
		setLayout(new FlowLayout());

		btn1 = new JButton("확인");
		btn2 = new JButton("취소");
		btn3 = new JButton("배경 변경");
		add(btn1);
		add(btn2);
		add(btn3);
		// 2. 리스너 등록
		btn1.addActionListener(new MyGUI());
		btn2.addActionListener(new MyGUI2());
		btn3.addActionListener(new MyGUI3());
		setSize(300, 150);
		setVisible(true);
	}
	//내부 클래스 정의
	class MyGUI implements ActionListener{

		@Override
		public void actionPerformed(ActionEvent e) {
			// TODO Auto-generated method stub
			btn1.setText("OK");
			setTitle("사용자가 OK버튼을 눌렀습니다.");
		}
		
	}
	class MyGUI2 implements ActionListener{

		@Override
		public void actionPerformed(ActionEvent e) {
			// TODO Auto-generated method stub
			btn2.setText("Cancle");
			setTitle("사용자가 Cancle버튼을 눌렀습니다.");
		}
		
	}
	class MyGUI3 implements ActionListener{

		@Override
		public void actionPerformed(ActionEvent e) {
			// TODO Auto-generated method stub
			btn1.setBackground(Color.pink);
			btn2.setBackground(Color.cyan);
		}
		
	}
	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		new EventTest2 ();
	}

}

package sec04;
import java.awt.*;
import java.awt.event.*;
import javax.swing.*;
public class MyMouseTest1 extends JFrame{
	//멤버 변수
	JLabel lbl;
	
	//생성자 정의
	MyMouseTest1(){
		//JLabel 컴포넌트 생성
		setLayout(new FlowLayout());
		lbl = new JLabel("오늘 뭐 먹지?");
		lbl.setForeground(Color.pink);	//전경색 : 테두리색, 글꼴색
		add(lbl);
		//2. 마우스 리스너 등록하기
		addMouseListener(new My1());
		setSize(500,500);
		setVisible(true);
	}
	//내부 리스너 클래스 정의
	class My1 implements MouseListener {

		@Override
		public void mouseClicked(MouseEvent e) {
			// TODO Auto-generated method stub
			
		}

		@Override
		public void mousePressed(MouseEvent e) {
			// TODO Auto-generated method stub
			//System.out.println(e.getX()+","+e.getY());
			int x = e.getX();
			int y = e.getY();
			lbl.setLocation(x,y);
		}

		@Override
		public void mouseReleased(MouseEvent e) {
			// TODO Auto-generated method stub
			
		}

		@Override
		public void mouseEntered(MouseEvent e) {
			// TODO Auto-generated method stub
			
		}

		@Override
		public void mouseExited(MouseEvent e) {
			// TODO Auto-generated method stub
			
		}
		
	}
	
	public static void main(String[] args) {
		new MyMouseTest1();
	}
}
